Auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard.

AddUser.title: Add User
AddUser.description: Register a new trainee and enroll them in a course.
AddUser.errorDuplicate: A user with this national ID or mobile already exists.
AddUser.errorMapping: The selected course or branch is not configured. Please contact support.
AddUser.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
AddUser.mobileInvalid: Must be a valid Saudi mobile number
AddUser.nationalIdInvalid: Must be a 10-digit national ID starting with 1 or 2

BulkImport.title: Bulk Import Users
BulkImport.description: Upload a CSV file to register multiple trainees at once.
BulkImport.uploadHint: CSV with columns: name, national_id, mobile, lang, school_id, dallah_course_code, licence_type
BulkImport.invalidFormat: Invalid file format. Please upload a .csv file.
BulkImport.noFile: Please select a CSV file first.
BulkImport.errorGeneral: Something went wrong during upload. Please try again.
BulkImport.templateError: Failed to download template. Please try again.

Enrollments.title: Users & Enrollments
Enrollments.description: View all users, edit their details, and manage their course enrollments.
Enrollments.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, mobile, or national ID…
Enrollments.name: Name
Enrollments.editUserDescription: Update user details. National ID cannot be changed.
Enrollments.editError: Failed to update user. Please try again.
Enrollments.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this enrollment? This will remove the user from the course.
Enrollments.errorNoEnrollment: No current enrollment exists to replace or delete.
Enrollments.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

UpdateUser.title: Update User Profile
UpdateUser.description: Search for a user and edit their details.
UpdateUser.errorDuplicate: Another user already has this national ID or mobile number.
UpdateUser.errorGeneral: Failed to update. Please try again.

Attendance.title: Notifications
Attendance.description: Unprocessed enrollment outcome notifications (oldest first, up to 100).
Attendance.errorGeneral: Failed to load notifications. Please try again.
